title: elsholtzia stachyodes
intro: Elsholtzia stachyodes, also known as Vietnamese balm or Vietnamese basil, is a fragrant, perennial herb native to Vietnam and southern China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elsholtzia stachyodes include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Elsholtzia stachyodes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
